title: Add repo-level rcql config and stronger default third-party excludes

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing repo-level rcql config file support (no backward-compat requirement) and expanding default exclude patterns to cover dist/build artifacts. CLI flags will override config.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented .rcql.json repo config support and expanded default third-party/build excludes (including dist/build/out/coverage/.next). Merge order is defaults -> repo config -> CLI flags. Added CLI --config switch (default .rcql.json; empty disables). Added/updated tests and docs. Validation: make check and make test both passed (118 tests).
